text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Huh? My body feels sluggish—like a fish out of water.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I open my eyes and find myself in an empty classroom with Agnes
Tachyon beside me. It's already evening.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
You're perspiring profusely. Your body temperature... Yes, you're
burning up quite a bit.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
You may be a guinea pig, but your body disperses heat just like a
human. But I suppose we'd have a problem if you didn't.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I look down at my body... and find myself strapped down to a
mysterious device!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text: This reminds me of when we first met. But things are a little different. This is my personal laboratory. Here, no one will get in my way!
choice_data_list: Laboratory... Isn't this just a normal classroom?!
Laboratory... Isn't this just a normal classroom?!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text: Not at all! I'm here because you wished for experimentation!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
You were the one who prepared this environment. As such, is it not
fitting to christen this as my laboratory?

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
Ahahaha! Know this—a guinea pig's duty is to accept all phenomena
as experiments waiting to happen.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
You were the one who chose to be my guinea pig. Do you think
you're in a position to demand when, where, or how my experiments
proceed?

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
If I am to surpass my limits and realize the latent potential of
Umamusume-kind, then I must devote myself to research—in other
words, more experiments!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
Now, I'll have you ingest my newest creation. Look, this one glows a
pleasant blue.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
Heh-heh-heh... With this, your muscular strength will increase a
thousandfold, giving birth to a body surpassing that of any monster!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text: All right, open wide.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: I'm helpless before her. After all, I did volunteer to be her guinea pig.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: I brace myself and slowly open my mouth—

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text: Good morning, my guinea pig.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I squint my eyes as rays of light assault my pupils. Could the medicine
from earlier have been...
choice_data_list: H-huh?! Was it all a dream?!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
Hm? You look rather frightened, you know? Did you have a nightmare
or something?

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
The lighting hasn't changed, yet your pupils are dilated.
Heh-heh-heh... You've piqued my interest. Go on, tell me all about it.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
Even now, modern science is unable to explain the precise
mechanisms of how we dream. However, from the lens of depth
psychology...

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
We can infer that the image of me within your subconscious is of an
Umamusume who experiments on people without considering their
feelings.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text: At any rate... I see. I can’t believe I did all that in your dream.
choice_data_list: Sorry, I didn't mean to offend you...
Sorry, I didn't mean to offend you...

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
Heh-heh... I really said, "Open wide"? The Tachyon in your dream
actually bothered asking?

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text: As if a guinea pig had any choice in the matter!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
Ahahaha! What're you looking surprised for? Did you forget that
you're my personal test subject?

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text: A shame about earlier, though. Just a little bit more and I would've quietly poured some Medicine-β down your gullet.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
Just to be clear, I was trying to show you mercy, okay? While β works
wonders, it comes at the cost of its rancid taste.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
But instead of me trying to pour 120 milliliters of β down your throat
without spilling, be a dear and flush it down yourself.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text: Much easier than having to force your mouth open after all!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
What's wrong, my dear little guinea pig? Step one—take the medicine
from my hand. Step two—drink it. Easy enough, right?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Murmur murmur...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Thanks to the side effects of β, I'm stuck with my thighs glowing
blue—and the local population's judging stares—for quite some time.
